TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Llyung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 67 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 13%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Llyung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Llyung hya' ga Libu. tay 'zil na Llyung hya' ga Uraw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lljuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa liβu. taj ʔzil na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Llyung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 13 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 67 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 13%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Llyung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Llyung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Llyung hya' ga Libu. tay 'zil na Llyung hya' ga Uraw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lljuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa liβu. taj ʔzil na lljuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa uraw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
